item.title: How Farming Has Changed Since the 1890s
item.description: A look at how farming has changed since the 1890s, showing the progress, tools, and daily work that shape farm life today.

media:content.media:title: How Farming Has Changed Since the 1890s
media:content.media:description: A look at how farming has changed since the 1890s, showing the progress, tools, and daily work that shape farm life today.

item.title: We Brought Our Auction Finds Home
item.description: Laura Farms brings their auction finds home and gets them settled in. A simple farm day with tractors, machinery, and the excitement of new additions.

media:content.media:title: We Brought Our Auction Finds Home
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms brings their auction finds home and gets them settled in. A simple farm day with tractors, machinery, and the excitement of new additions.

item.title: Can This 59-Year-Old Tractor Be Fixed?
item.description: Laura Farms takes a look at a 59-year-old tractor and works through the question of whether it can be fixed.

media:content.media:title: Can This 59-Year-Old Tractor Be Fixed?
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes a look at a 59-year-old tractor and works through the question of whether it can be fixed.

item.title: The Oldest Tractor I've Ever Seen!
item.description: Laura Farms takes a look at an incredibly old tractor and shares the experience of seeing farm machinery with a long history.

media:content.media:title: The Oldest Tractor I've Ever Seen!
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes a look at an incredibly old tractor and shares the experience of seeing farm machinery with a long history.

item.title: Small Ridges Give the Truck Trouble
item.description: A simple ridge can make a big difference in the field. Laura Farms shows the challenge and the steady work it takes to keep moving.

media:content.media:title: Small Ridges Give the Truck Trouble
media:content.media:description: A simple ridge can make a big difference in the field. Laura Farms shows the challenge and the steady work it takes to keep moving.

item.title: Fertilizing 36 Million Corn Plants
item.description: Laura Farms shows the work behind fertilizing 36 million corn plants, highlighting the scale, steady effort, and daily farm life in the field.

media:content.media:title: Fertilizing 36 Million Corn Plants
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows the work behind fertilizing 36 million corn plants, highlighting the scale, steady effort, and daily farm life in the field.

item.title: Everything We Got at the Farm Auction
item.description: Laura Farms shares everything they picked up at the farm auction, giving a look at the finds and the farm life moments behind the haul.

media:content.media:title: Everything We Got at the Farm Auction
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares everything they picked up at the farm auction, giving a look at the finds and the farm life moments behind the haul.

item.title: Stocking My Pond With Fish
item.description: Laura Farms stocks the pond with fish, sharing a simple farm-life moment and a hands-on look at caring for the land.

media:content.media:title: Stocking My Pond With Fish
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms stocks the pond with fish, sharing a simple farm-life moment and a hands-on look at caring for the land.

item.title: Starting Up a Classic John Deere Tractor
item.description: Laura Farms starts up a classic John Deere tractor, sharing a simple farm moment with a timeless machine.

media:content.media:title: Starting Up a Classic John Deere Tractor
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms starts up a classic John Deere tractor, sharing a simple farm moment with a timeless machine.

item.title: Will Our Old John Deere Start Again?
item.description: Laura Farms checks whether their old John Deere will start again, sharing a real farm moment with machinery, patience, and determination.

media:content.media:title: Will Our Old John Deere Start Again?
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms checks whether their old John Deere will start again, sharing a real farm moment with machinery, patience, and determination.
